CustomField.description: Maps to Recurring_Donation__c.Day_of_Month__c on the Recurring Donation during data import processing. Sets which day of the month installment Opportunities are created. Values of 29 or 30 use the last day for shorter months.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the day of the month for installment Opportunities (1-30). For 29 or 30, shorter months use their last day.
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Day of Month
